changelog: Flavors: persist API name separately from display name; fix Name column showing UUID after save/reload
Images: fix display name falling back to UUID; expand image name field resolution
Config options: fix optionname format (was DisplayName|ID, now ID|DisplayName) so order page shows display names
Additional tab: replace Default Project dropdown with radio-button table showing Region + Project per row
Additional tab: remove Default Region option, title, and subtitle
Toolbar: separate loading spinner (left) from saving spinner (right) for Images and Flavors tabs
Loading text: Images shows 'Fetching images from region (N/M)', Flavors shows 'Fetching flavors from region (N/M)'
Disk Sizes: Save button now disables during save
